title: Mitophagy assay
steps: About 0.5 x10^5 cells stably expressing mito‐QC mitophagy reporter system (mCherry‐GFP‐FIS1101–152)were seeded onto sterile glass coverslips in 24‐well dishes.
Next day, treated cell with or without 0.5mM DFP for 24 hours
After treatment, coverslips were washed twice with PBS, fixed with 3.7% (w/v)formaldehyde, 200 mM HEPES pH 7.0 for 10 min and washed twice with PBS
After nuclei counterstaining with 1 μg/ml Hoechst‐33258 dye, slides were washed andmounted in ProLong Gold (Invitrogen).
Image were captured with Nikon A1 confocal microscope under a 60 x oil objective.
creator: Yongjia Duan
